text: Generation Probabilities are Not Enough: Improving Error Highlighting in Al Code Suggestions

img_path: output/Generation Probabilities are Not Enough: Improving Error Highlighting for AI Code Suggestions_poster/visuals/images/fig_1.jpg

text: Programmers increasingly use Al generated code (e.g., from CoPilot) in IDEs!
However,generated code may be erroneous! We need to help programmers double-check Al code and identify when and where it may be incorrect.
We explore two options to highlight uncertain, potentially erroneous regions:

list_items: Use generation probabilities or "confidence scores" to show where the model is uncertain
Learn an edit model to show where programmersare most likely to make edits

text: Mixed-methods, within-subjects study with 30 programmers showed that edit model leads to:
